queries.question: Which expansions increased capacity to 1500 passengers per day and which renovations made the same capacity per day?
queries.sql:
SELECT Expansions.Airport_Expansion as Modernization
FROM Expansions
WHERE Expansions.Increased_Capacity = "1500 Passengers per day"
UNION
SELECT Renovations.Renovation as Modernization
FROM Renovations
WHERE Renovations.Increased_Capacity = "1500 Passengers per day"

queries.question: Provide a list of all expansions and also provide a list of renovations that increased capacity to 1500 passengers per day.
queries.sql:
SELECT Expansions.Airport_Expansion as Modernization
FROM Expansions
UNION
SELECT Renovations.Renovation as Modernization
FROM Renovations
WHERE Renovations.Increased_Capacity = "1500 Passengers per day"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show expansions and renovations that increased capacity to 1500 passengers per day.
